fixture.title: Catalog Recorded Importer Fixtures
fixture.summary: Synthetic VNDB dump, EGS recorded-response, DLsite storefront, and Steam storefront fixtures for deterministic external-source importer verification without live network access.

license.evidence: Hand-authored synthetic VNDB-shaped dump rows, EGS-shaped recorded responses, DLsite-shaped storefront metadata, and Steam-shaped appdetails responses; no third-party raw assets, private catalog payloads, or credentials.

provenance.author: Itotori contributors
provenance.creationMethod: Hand-authored synthetic public metadata fixtures for CATALOG-011 and CATALOG-012 recorded importer provenance and idempotency tests.

aggregateStats.notes: Covers VNDB external ids, titles, releases, language facts, source-version provenance, EGS product ids, DLsite product identity, work_type, release metadata, language indicators, translation trees, demand facts, Steam app identity, supported-language metadata, package/delisting status, fetched-at/request identity provenance, importer seed targets, rate-limit metadata, semantic diagnostics, and CATALOG-065 idempotent reruns.
